product_overview: A dealership management web app for tracking inventory, customers, leads, sales, expenses, approvals, and reporting. It also includes organization setup and configurable settings for pipeline, fields, branches, and localization.
core_goals: Set up a dealership organization and access the main dashboard
Manage vehicle inventory and customer records
Track leads through a configurable sales pipeline
Record cash sales and operational expenses
Review profit approvals and analyze business performance
Configure org-wide settings, custom fields, and team structure

features.name: Onboarding Wizard
features.description: Guides a new user through creating an organization and selecting the default currency before entering the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See the onboarding wizard overlay -> Enter dealership name -> Proceed to the currency step -> Select a currency -> Complete the wizard -> See the main dashboard

features.name: Vehicle Inventory Management
features.description: Lets users search, add, edit, and delete vehicles in inventory, including VIN-based auto-fill for vehicle details.
user_flows: Navigate to /vehicles -> Search for a vehicle -> View matching inventory results

Navigate to /vehicles -> Start adding a vehicle -> Enter a VIN -> Trigger VIN decoding -> Review auto-filled vehicle details -> Enter remaining vehicle information -> Save the vehicle -> See the vehicle appear in the inventory list
Navigate to /vehicles -> Choose an existing vehicle to edit -> Update vehicle details -> Save changes -> See the updated record in the list
Navigate to /vehicles -> Choose an existing vehicle to remove -> Confirm deletion -> See the vehicle removed from the inventory list

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Supports creating, searching, editing, and deleting customer records in the CRM.
user_flows: Navigate to /customers -> Search for a customer by name or phone -> See matching customer records
Navigate to /customers -> Start adding a customer -> Enter first name, last name, phone, and email -> Save the record -> See the new customer in the list
Navigate to /customers -> Choose an existing customer to edit -> Update customer details -> Save changes -> See the updated customer record
Navigate to /customers -> Choose an existing customer to delete -> Confirm removal -> See the customer removed from the list

features.name: Lead Pipeline
features.description: Provides a Kanban-style sales pipeline for creating leads, assigning customer and vehicle interest, and moving leads between stages.
user_flows: Navigate to /leads -> View leads grouped by stage in Kanban columns

Navigate to /leads -> Start adding a lead -> Select a customer -> Select a vehicle of interest -> Choose a lead source and pipeline stage -> Save the lead -> See the new lead card in the appropriate stage
Navigate to /leads -> Open an existing lead card -> Change the stage -> See the lead move to a different pipeline column
Navigate to /leads -> Open an existing lead card -> Update lead details -> Save changes -> See the updated lead information

features.name: Cash Sale Wizard
features.description: Guides users through recording a completed cash vehicle sale in a three-step workflow.
user_flows: Navigate to /sales -> Start the cash sale flow -> Select a vehicle -> Select or create a customer -> Enter the sale price -> Review the summary -> Confirm the sale -> See the new sale in the recent sales list

features.name: Expense Tracking
features.description: Lets users record, search, and delete operational expenses such as repairs, maintenance, and detailing.
user_flows: Navigate to /expenses -> Start recording an expense -> Enter the expense title, amount, category, vendor, and date -> Optionally link a vehicle -> Save the expense -> See the expense in the list
Navigate to /expenses -> Search expenses by title or category -> See matching expense records
Navigate to /expenses -> Choose an expense to delete -> Confirm removal -> See the expense removed from the list

features.name: Approval Workflow
features.description: Allows managers to review pending below-minimum-profit sales and approve or reject them.
user_flows: Navigate to /approvals -> View pending approval cards -> Review salesperson, vehicle, requested profit, and minimum allowed profit -> Approve the request -> See the approval card removed from the list
Navigate to /approvals -> View pending approval cards -> Review salesperson, vehicle, requested profit, and minimum allowed profit -> Reject the request -> See the approval card removed from the list

features.name: Language Toggle (EN/AR RTL)
features.description: Switches the interface between English left-to-right layout and Arabic right-to-left layout.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Use the language toggle in the sidebar -> See the interface switch to Arabic -> See the layout change to RTL
Navigate to /dashboard -> Use the language toggle in the sidebar again -> See the interface switch back to English -> See the layout change to LTR

features.name: General Settings
features.description: Allows organization owners to configure currency, VAT rate, and branding-related settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/general -> Change the currency setting -> Enter a VAT rate -> Save the settings -> See the updated currency reflected across the app

features.name: Pipeline Stage Configuration
features.description: Lets users seed, edit, reorder, and deactivate lead pipeline stages.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/pipeline -> Seed the default stages -> See the pipeline stages populate
Navigate to /settings/pipeline -> Edit a stage label -> Change the stage color -> Save the update -> See the revised stage settings
Navigate to /settings/pipeline -> Reorder stages -> Toggle a stage inactive -> See the pipeline reflect the new configuration

features.name: Custom Fields
features.description: Enables users to create custom fields for vehicles, customers, and leads and make them available in create/edit dialogs.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/custom-fields -> Select an entity type -> Add a new field -> Enter the field name, key, and type -> Save the field -> See the field appear in the entity configuration
Navigate to /settings/custom-fields -> Select a different entity type -> Add another field -> Save it -> See the new custom field available in that entity's create/edit dialog

features.name: Reports
features.description: Displays financial and inventory analytics with date-range filtering and salesperson performance breakdowns.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Choose a date range -> View total revenue, profit, and expenses charts -> Review salesperson performance breakdown

routes.description: Main KPI dashboard showing revenue, vehicles, leads
Vehicle inventory list with search, filter, add/edit/delete
Customer CRM list with search and dialog-based CRUD
Lead pipeline board with Kanban view and stage management
Sales home with wizard launcher and in-progress draft resume
Completed sales list with search, edit, delete, PDF export
Profit approval requests for managers to approve/reject
Financial and inventory reports with date filtering
Team member management with role assignment
Org settings (currency, VAT, timezone, logo, WhatsApp)
Create custom fields for vehicles, customers, leads
Tiered commission configuration by profit threshold

features.name: Onboarding Wizard
features.description: Multi-step wizard for first-time users to create their org and pick currency
user_interactions: New user sees wizard overlay automatically (no active org)
Enter dealership name in text input
Click Next to proceed to currency step
Select currency from dropdown
Click Next to reach final step
Click "Go to Dashboard" button
Wizard closes and main dashboard renders

features.name: Vehicle Inventory Management
features.description: Add, edit, delete vehicles with VIN decode, image upload, approval workflow
user_interactions: Click "Add Vehicle" button to open dialog
Type a VIN and click the decode icon
Verify make, model, year auto-filled by NHTSA API
Fill color, mileage, purchase price, selling price
Click Save
See new vehicle in inventory table
Click pencil icon to edit a vehicle
Click trash icon and confirm deletion
Search vehicles using search input

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Create and manage customer records
user_interactions: Search customers by name or phone
Click "Add Customer" to open dialog
Fill firstName, lastName, phone, email
Click Save to create
Click edit icon to update a customer
Click delete icon and confirm to remove

features.name: Lead Pipeline
features.description: Kanban board for tracking sales leads through configurable pipeline stages
user_interactions: View leads grouped by stage in Kanban columns
Click "Add Lead" button
Select customer from searchable dropdown
Select vehicle of interest from searchable dropdown
Select lead source and pipeline stage
Click Save
Click a lead card to edit it
Change stage dropdown to move lead through pipeline

features.name: Cash Sale Wizard
features.description: Three-step guided wizard to record a cash vehicle sale
user_interactions: Click "Cash Sale" button on sales home page

user_interactions.Step 2: Select or create customer, enter sale price

user_interactions: See sale appear in recent sales list

features.name: Expense Tracking
features.description: Record and categorize operational expenses
user_interactions: Click "Record Expense" button
Fill title, amount, category (REPAIR/MAINTENANCE/DETAILING)
Enter vendor name and date
Optionally link to a vehicle
Click Save
Search expenses by title or category
Click delete and confirm to remove

features.name: Approval Workflow
features.description: Managers review and approve/reject below-minimum-profit sale requests
user_interactions: View pending approval cards showing salesperson and vehicle
See requested profit vs minimum allowed
Click Approve button to approve the deal
Click Reject button to reject the deal
Approved card disappears from the list

features.name: Language Toggle (EN/AR RTL)
features.description: Switch UI between English (LTR) and Arabic (RTL)
user_interactions: Click the language toggle button in the sidebar (shows EN or AR)
UI text switches to Arabic
Layout direction flips to RTL
Click again to return to English LTR

features.name: General Settings
features.description: Configure org currency, VAT rate, and branding
user_interactions: Navigate to Settings > General
Change currency dropdown to AED
Enter VAT rate
Click Save
Verify currency symbol updates across app

features.name: Pipeline Stage Configuration
features.description: Customize lead pipeline stage labels, colors, and order
user_interactions: Navigate to Settings > Pipeline
Click "Seed Defaults" to load default stages
Edit a stage label
Change stage color
Drag stages to reorder
Toggle a stage inactive

features.name: Custom Fields
features.description: Create custom fields for vehicles, customers, and leads
user_interactions: Navigate to Settings > Custom Fields
Select entity type tab (Vehicle / Customer / Lead)
Click "Add Field"
Enter field name, key, type
Save field
Custom field appears in the entity's create/edit dialog

features.name: Reports
features.description: Financial and inventory analytics with date range filtering
user_interactions: Navigate to Reports
Select a date range from the date picker
View total revenue, profit, and expenses charts
See salesperson performance breakdown

known_limitations.issue: Auth flows use Clerk hosted pages — E2E tests need pre-seeded test credentials
known_limitations.impact: Login step requires real Clerk test user credentials in env vars

known_limitations.issue: VIN decode calls external NHTSA API — may be slow or unavailable in CI
known_limitations.impact: VIN decode assertions may need a mock or longer timeout
